title: Industrial Floor Coatings for Locker Rooms & Restrooms - Elite South Texas
content:
Locker Rooms & Restrooms
Our HERMETIC™ Flooring Systems are engineered for a variety of environments including locker rooms, restrooms and showers, where the surfaces will be cleaned frequently and disinfected. These surfaces are slip resistant when wet, antimicrobial and can offer an integrated cove base and protective wall coatings to keep water and liquids contained.
Advantages
Easy to clean and maintain
Ultra-durable, high abrasion resistance withstands heavy traffic
Fluid applied systems for new construction or existing floor restoration
Finish options include high gloss or satin
Variable coefficient of friction (COF) levels to meet or exceed ADA Flat Surfaces, ADA Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA requirements
Antimicrobial and stain resistant
Seamless flooring, no grout lines to harbor bacteria
Impermeable, non-porous
Vertical applications available to protect walls from water and chemical damage
Locker Rooms
Restrooms
Shower Areas
